title: Audited Financial Statements
why_it_matters: Contains the audited consolidated financial statements of Qdoba Funding Holdco LLC (the franchisor's indirect parent) and Qdoba Corporation. Only entity with less than 3 years of financials — organized Sept 2023. Includes guaranties of performance from both entities. Required to assess franchisor financial health and guaranty enforceability.
key_burden_or_function: Auditor (Deloitte) issued unqualified opinion. Qdoba Funding Holdco LLC guarantees franchisor's franchise agreement obligations. Qdoba Corporation guarantees QRC's management agreement obligations but does NOT guarantee the franchise agreement itself. This structural gap means the entity actually performing support services (QRC) is not the entity contractually obligated to franchisees.

title: List of State Administrators
why_it_matters: Lists state franchise regulators. Referenced in front matter for state registration requirements.
key_burden_or_function: Informational — contact information for franchise regulators in registration states.

title: Agents for Service of Process
why_it_matters: Lists agents for service of process by state. Referenced in Item 1.

title: List of Current Franchised Locations and Former Franchisees
why_it_matters: Contains current franchised locations with names, addresses, phone numbers; former franchisees who had outlets terminated/canceled/not renewed/ceased in FY2025; and signed-but-not-open agreements. Critical for due diligence reference calls. FDD warns that confidentiality clauses restrict some franchisees from speaking openly.
key_burden_or_function: Primary source for franchisee validation and reference calls. Confidentiality clause warning is a material diligence limitation.

title: Franchise Agreement
why_it_matters: The binding contract governing the franchise relationship. Contains all operative clauses for fees, territory, noncompete, termination, transfer, default, renewal, guaranty, security interest, dispute resolution, and post-term obligations. Item 17 summary tables provide a high-level view, but the actual agreement language was not directly read.
key_burden_or_function: Governs: 10-year term, 5% royalty, 4.5% marketing, first-priority security interest in business assets, spousal guaranty, 2-year/5-mile post-term noncompete, California forum/law, unrestricted franchisor assignment, ROFR, remodel-at-renewal requirement, franchisor sole discretion on Manual changes.

title: License Agreement
why_it_matters: Governs non-traditional locations (airports, universities, military, etc.). Different terms from Franchise Agreement: negotiable term, 6% royalty, 1.75% marketing, 10% noncompete threshold (not 20%), 1-year post-term noncompete (not 2 years), no ROFR, no death/disability provision.
key_burden_or_function: Materially different noncompete and fee structure from the Franchise Agreement. Lower bar for competitive activity (10% vs 20% threshold).

title: Development Agreement
why_it_matters: Governs multi-unit development rights, Development Area protections, development schedule, and Minimum Development Quota. Failure to meet quota results in default and loss of territorial protections. No renewal option. $10,000/restaurant development fee.
key_burden_or_function: Development schedule set by franchisor; failure triggers default. Territorial protection lost on default. Transfer must include all restaurants covered by the Development Agreement.

title: Table of Contents — Manuals
why_it_matters: Shows scope of operational control — 466 pages of confidential operating manuals. Manuals are subject to change at franchisor's sole discretion without franchisee consent.
key_burden_or_function: Defines the full operational control surface. Changes are unilateral.

title: State Specific Addenda and Agreement Amendments
why_it_matters: May contain material overrides to noncompete scope, termination cure periods, forum selection, choice of law, and other provisions for specific registration states. Multiple Item 17 provisions are explicitly subject to state law.
key_burden_or_function: Potentially modifies: noncompete enforceability, termination rights, cure periods, forum/venue, governing law, renewal rights. Must be read for any state-specific investment decision.

title: Certification of Entity Structure and Operation Form
why_it_matters: Ownership disclosure requirement for franchisee entities.
key_burden_or_function: Franchisee must certify entity structure and ownership.

title: General Release of All Claims
why_it_matters: Required at transfer and renewal. Scope of release matters — a broad release may waive claims the franchisee would otherwise have. Referenced as a condition for transfer approval and renewal.
key_burden_or_function: Franchisee must sign general release as condition of transfer or renewal. Operative scope not surfaced.

title: Master Technology Agreement
why_it_matters: Governs the technology stack obligations described in Item 11. Given the extensive IT fee structure ($6.3K-$18.6K/yr base + 0.21% of sales + project fees) and no contractual limit on upgrade costs, the operative terms of this agreement are material.
key_burden_or_function: Defines technology obligations, upgrade requirements, and access rights. Franchisor has independent access to all systems and data.

title: Authorization for Prearranged Payments
why_it_matters: ACH/direct debit authorization for royalty, marketing fees, and other recurring payments. Franchisor can directly debit franchisee bank account.
key_burden_or_function: Authorizes automatic bank debits for all recurring franchise fees.

title: Non-Disclosure Agreement
why_it_matters: Required before application package submission. Establishes confidentiality obligations before any franchise relationship begins.

title: Stored Value Card Service Agreement
why_it_matters: Governs the Q-Cash spending card program operated by affiliate QMG Stored Value Cards LLC. Mandatory participation. Monthly fee of $7.75.
key_burden_or_function: Mandatory gift card program participation with monthly fees and required hardware/software purchases.
